channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: CIF NorCal basketball playoffs: Tuesday’s top storylines, surprises, more
item.description: Oakland Tech, San Ramon Valley, King's Academy boys, Carondelet, Bishop O'Dowd girls among Tuesday's opening-round winners.
item.dc:creator: Devin Bradshaw, correspondent, Nathan Canilao, Christian Babcock, The Mercury News

item.title: The Mets have spent more in Steve Cohen's 4 years than Marlins, Pirates and Rays over the past 21
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — The New York Mets led the major leagues in spending for the third straight season in 2024 and have totaled $1.36 billion in payroll and luxury tax over four years under owner Steve Cohen, exceeding what the Marlins, Pirates and Rays each have spent on players in the past 21 seasons.
item.dc:creator: RONALD BLUM, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Ron DeSantis chirps at Canada's 'boycott' of Florida, country's Stanley Cup drought
item.description: Florida Gov. Ron DeSantis took his own shot at Canada on Tuesday, throwing a jab at the country's 32-year-old Stanley Cup drought.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Danica Patrick tells Riley Gaines there are 'clear biological differences' between males, females
item.description: Danica Patrick said on Riley Gaines' podcast that "there are just clear biological differences between" males and females when it comes to sports.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Lewis Hamilton's move to Ferrari is having a cultural impact far beyond Formula 1
item.description: Met Gala chair, co-producer on a Brad Pitt movie, activist, and now Ferrari driver. Lewis Hamilton's impact stretches far beyond Formula 1 and his quest to win a record-breaking eighth world title with his new team.
item.dc:creator: JAMES ELLINGWORTH, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Emma Raducanu says she struggled to breathe after seeing 'fixated' man in the crowd
item.description: INDIAN WELLS, Calif. (AP) — Emma Raducanu says she “couldn't see the ball through tears” and struggled to breathe after spotting a man who was “fixated” on her during a match. The British tennis player and 2021 U.S.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Top-ranked Auburn 'physically dominated' in loss to No. 22 Texas A&M
item.description: COLLEGE STATION, Texas (AP) — Auburn coach Bruce Pearl knew exactly why his top-ranked team fell to No. 22 Texas A&M on Tuesday night. “They just physically dominated us,” he said. The Aggies never trailed in the 83-72 victory which snapped a season-long four-game skid.
item.dc:creator: KRISTIE RIEKEN, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: No. 1 Auburn falls 83-72 to No. 22 Texas A&M behind Zhuric Phelps' 19 points
item.description: COLLEGE STATION, Texas (AP) — Zhuric Phelps scored 19 points off the bench and No. 22 Texas A&M never trailed in an 83-72 win over top-ranked Auburn on Tuesday night. It’s Texas A&M’s first-ever win over a team ranked No.
item.dc:creator: KRISTIE RIEKEN, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Red Sox's Garrett Crochet opens up about drama surrounding last season's contract talks
item.description: Red Sox starting pitcher Garrett Crochet took issue with accusations that labeled him "greedy" during last season's contract extension drama.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Bruins trade big forward Trent Frederic to the Oilers in a 3-team deal with the Devils
item.description: The defending Western Conference champion Edmonton Oilers made their first big move ahead of the NHL trade deadline Tuesday, acquiring hard-nosed forward Trent Frederic from the Boston Bruins.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN WHYNO, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: ACC, Clemson, Florida State approve settlement to end legal fight, change revenue-distribution model
item.description: The Atlantic Coast Conference, Clemson and Florida State are ready to move forward together after legal fights that threatened the stability of the league.
item.dc:creator: AARON BEARD, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Jimmy Johnson retires from Fox Sports after being face of NFL coverage for most of 3 decades
item.description: Jimmy Johnson, the Pro Football Hall of Fame coach who won two Super Bowls and a college national championship, announced his retirement from Fox Sports on Monday after being part of its NFL coverage for most of the network's 31 years.
item.dc:creator: Eric Olson, WFLA, NBC

item.title: LeBron James becomes first to score 50,000 combined points in NBA regular season and playoffs
item.description: LeBron James has become the first player in NBA history to score 50,000 combined points in the regular season and postseason.
item.dc:creator: Greg Beacham, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Goalie of the future? Spencer Knight makes 41 saves, backstops Blackhawks to win over Kings in debut with team
item.description: CHICAGO (WGN, AP) — Spencer Knight was once considered the goaltender of the future for one NHL franchise. Now he plans to make a case as the goaltender of the future for another, and he got right to work with the Blackhawks.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: Shoeless Joe Jackson's personal scrapbooks hit auction
item.description: NEW YORK (WGN) — A pair of scrapbooks belonging to "Shoeless" Joe Jackson are up for bid over the next two weeks. Offered by Leland's Auctions, up for bid is a collection of Joe Jackson's personal scrapbooks obtained directly from Jackson's family.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Senate to vote on bill banning trans athletes from women's sports
item.description: The legislation asserts under Title IX protections for female athletes that gender is “recognized based solely on a person’s reproductive biology and genetics at birth.
item.dc:creator: Anna Kutz, NewsNation

item.title: Naomi Girma is injured on her Chelsea debut after world record transfer
item.description: Naomi Girma, women’s soccer's first million-dollar player, was injured and substituted on her Chelsea debut on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: JAMES ROBSON, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Bears prospects to watch at the NFL Scouting Combine: Offensive line
item.description: INDIANAPOLIS, Ind. (WGN) — It's the final day of workouts at the NFL Scouting Combine, and Sunday's position group is the one with the most buzz around them when it comes to the Chicago Bears—offensive line.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Bulls guard, Chicago native Ayo Dosunmu to have shoulder surgery, out for season, team announces
item.description: CHICAGO — The 2024-25 season is over for Bulls guard and Chicago native Ayo Dosunmu. The team announced Sunday morning the fourth-year player and former University of Illinois star will undergo left shoulder surgery and will miss the rest of the season.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: RSL shuts out Seattle in MLS home opener, 2-0
item.description: SANDY, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - Having scored just one goal in its first three games of the 2025 campaign, Real Salt Lake got some help from the Seattle Sounders on its way to a 2-0 victory in its MLS home opener Saturday afternoon.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Angelo Posada, The Titan of the Titans
item.description: "Those who stay will be champions" - that's the motto of Poway Wrestling; one they adopted from Michigan Football under that was adopted under legendary head Coach Bo Schembechler. That motto rings true for the five-time state champion Titans, who have won 44 CIF SDS titles in the last 47 years.
item.dc:creator: Chase Izidoro, Fox 5

item.title: BYU drains 17 three-pointers in 91-81 win over ASU
item.description: TEMPE, Ariz. (ABC4 Sports) - Richie Saunders scored 26 points, Trevin Knell added 18 and No. 25 BYU beat short-handed Arizona State 91-81 on Wednesday night to extend its winning streak to five games.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4
